common.appDescription: Catalog, costing and publishing for 3D printing.

dashboard.subtitulo: Catalog, costing and publishing for 3D printing.
dashboard.topNota: The machine is the bottleneck: we prioritize what yields most per print hour.
dashboard.riesgoNota: Only own or commercially-licensed models are sold. CC-BY-NC and "Personal" are blocked.

config.subtitulo: These parameters govern the WHOLE catalog. Changing them here recalculates all prices instantly.
config.marcaDesc: Customize your instance's name, logo and colors (white-label).
config.guardadoOk: ✓ Settings saved. The catalog recalculated prices.

campos.costoFilamentoHint: if the filament isn't in the catalog
campos.potenciaHint: if the model has no printer assigned

integraciones.subtitulo: Connect Mercado Libre to import your sales history (feeds the forecast) and receive real-time events.
integraciones.errorConexion: Couldn't connect Mercado Libre. Check that the Redirect URI matches and try again.
integraciones.faltaAuth: Mercado Libre account authorization pending (one click).
integraciones.notaConectado: The sync brings recent paid orders into the database, for the forecast.
integraciones.notaNoConectado: Open this link in your Mercado Libre session and authorize the app once.
integraciones.webhooksDesc: ML sends every event here (sale, message, payment, shipping…). Endpoint:

todos.label: All
todos.desc: The full catalog, sorted by profitability/hour.

listos.label: Ready to publish
listos.desc: Legally eligible + validated + not yet published on ML.

rentabilidad.label: High profitability/hour
rentabilidad.desc: The ones that yield the most per printer hour.

rapidos.label: Fast (<3h)
rapidos.desc: Printing under 3 hours: more turnover, less risk.

riesgo.label: Legal risk
riesgo.desc: 🔴 Third-party BRAND/IP — do not publish without an explicit decision.

nicho.label: By niche
nicho.desc: Filter by niche / seasonality for campaigns.

riesgoTitulo.amarillo: IP-clean, but the file license is restricted (Personal/NC). Publishable at your own risk (layer 2).
riesgoTitulo.rojo: Contains a third-party BRAND or CHARACTER. Do not publish without an explicit decision.

tabla.abrirAnuncio: Open the listing on Mercado Libre

salud.verMotivoTitle: Open in Mercado Libre to see the exact reason and edit the listing
salud.noVisibleTitle: Not visible on ML until it's active

guia.titulo: 📘 What is this and what do I do? (quick guide)
guia.intro: Here you see how your listings are doing on Mercado Libre. Open it when you have a moment and review them in batches. Hit “Refresh status” to see the latest. Tap any listing to open its page and manage it.
guia.problema: 🛑 With a problem: Mercado Libre rejected them. Open them and fix the issue (sometimes it's a brand word in the title, e.g. “Durlock”) or pause the listing.
guia.revision: 🟠 Under ML review: ML is checking them. They usually go live on their own within a few hours — do nothing, just wait.
guia.pausado: ⏸️ Paused: they're not selling (because you or ML paused them).
guia.vendidos: 🛒 Sold / Orders: what already sold — there you see the orders to print and deliver.
guia.nota: You don't have to be here all the time: come in when you have free time and handle several at once.

problema.desc: ML rejected them (forbidden/closed) — fix or pause them.

revision.desc: ML is moderating/processing them — they usually resolve on their own.

pausado.desc: Not visible for sale (paused by us or by ML).

sin.desc: We haven't checked their status yet — hit Refresh.

razon.forbidden: ML banned it. It's almost always: a third-party brand in the title, a disallowed category, or a near-duplicate listing. Open it in ML to see the exact reason and fix it.
razon.fichaYFotos: The listing details are incomplete and ML is still processing the photos. Open it in ML and complete what it asks for.
razon.fichaTecnica: The technical details are incomplete (a required field for the category). Open it in ML and fill in what it flags.
razon.fotos: ML is still downloading/validating the photos. It usually resolves on its own.
razon.denuncia: It received a report. Check the reason in ML.
razon.sinStock: Out of stock: set it to 1 or more to reactivate.

pedidos.subtitulo: Move the status forward as you print and deliver; the board updates on its own.
pedidos.vacio: No orders yet. They come in automatically when you sync your Mercado Libre sales.

tablero.impresionResumen: {enProceso} in progress · {horasRequeridas} h required / {capacidad} h available ({dias} days)
tablero.ayuda: Green = you're on time (even with several). Amber = time to get moving. Red = act now. It refreshes on its own. For a focus/smart screen:

importar.subtitulo: Upload a pack's ZIP (one folder per model, with photos). The system creates the models on its own and leaves them in <revision>Review</revision> for approval. You don't need to install anything.
importar.guiaTitulo: 📘 How do I import a pack? (quick guide)
importar.guiaPaso1: Have the pack's ZIP ready (it should have one folder per model, with the photos inside).
importar.guiaPaso2: Click “Pack ZIP file” and pick it.
importar.guiaPaso3: Enter the Category (e.g. Planters, Lamps, Organizers) and the Source (where the pack came from).
importar.guiaPaso4: Click “Import pack” and wait. Large packs take a while — don't close the page.
importar.guiaPaso5: Done: the models show up in <revision>Review</revision> in 🟡 yellow. There you decide which ones to publish.
importar.guiaNota: They're created as 🟡 “to review” on purpose, so you can choose. The system checks brand/IP from the photo afterward. If a pack is very large (> 1.2 GB), split it into fewer categories and upload it in parts.
importar.procesandoPack: Processing the pack (extracting photos and creating models)…
importar.notaPie: Note: they're created in 🟡 yellow (license “to review”) so you can decide. Brand/IP detection from the photo and the 3D mesh for printing are processed afterward. Very large packs (>1.2 GB) are best split by category.

revision.subtitulo: Batch pending approval · {n} models ({verde} {verdes} green · {amarillo} {amarillos} amber).

subtituloAccion.despues: ; or approve them on Telegram with the bot.

resultado.fallidos: ⚠️ {n} could not be published (check the model)

revision.vacio: No models pending review. Import a batch so it shows up here.

barra.instruccion: Check the ones you want and choose an action:

notificaciones.subtitulo: Which emails we notify and what Mercado Libre alerts are coming in.

guia.parte1: Mercado Libre sends alerts (rejections, sales, questions) by email to the account. That email is forwarded to your Gmail and a small script sends it here, which extracts the reason and the listing and displays it. This way the rejection reason also appears in
guia.nota: Below you manage which emails we notify (for monitoring). The config for which emails Mercado Libre sends to is set in the ML account; here we only record it and see what comes in.

avisos.vacio: No alerts have arrived yet. When ML sends an email (rejection, sale…) and forwarding is set up, it will appear here with its reason.

filamentos.subtitulo: The cost per kg feeds into the costing of each model (matched by filament type).

impresoras.subtitulo: Power and depreciation feed the cost model; capacity decides when to buy more machines.
impresoras.notaCapacidad: Capacity = available printers × {horas} h/day (from Settings). In Phase D it is matched against forecasted demand to tell you when it makes sense to buy another printer.

setup.intro: Customize your instance's name, logo and colors. Do it by hand or let AI propose a brand (you'll need your own fal.ai, OpenAI or Claude token). Everything is optional and can be changed later.
setup.aiNota: Paste your own token. It isn't saved: it's used only for this generation.
setup.vendedorMlHint: Appears in the brand and the description signature.
setup.confirmarNota: All set. You can change anything later from Settings.

modeloDetalle.avisoMwOk: ✓ MakerWorld data applied (only empty fields were filled in).
modeloDetalle.avisoMwFail: Couldn't read from MakerWorld. Nothing was changed.
modeloDetalle.avisoPubFail: Couldn't complete the action on Mercado Libre.
modeloDetalle.avisoValOk: ✓ Mercado Libre validated the listing: publishing would work. (No listing was created.)
modeloDetalle.avisoValFail: ⚠️ ML reports adjustments needed before publishing: {msg}
modeloDetalle.fotoPlaceholder: URL of a photo or render (https://…)
modeloDetalle.resuelvePendientes: Resolve the pending items to enable.
modeloDetalle.makerworldDesc: Search the model on MakerWorld by name and pick the right one (it brings the cover and data), or paste the URL directly. It only fills empty fields.
modeloDetalle.catalogoTitulo: 📦 Mercado Libre catalog (optional — exact product only)
modeloDetalle.catalogoDesc: The recommended path for your own prints is the free listing (above). The catalog is the exception: it only links when the model IS exactly a product that already exists on ML (same brand/model). Compare the photos and confirm before linking.

buscarCatalogo.advertencia: Link to the catalog only if it is exactly the same product (same brand/model). For original prints, use the free listing (above).

modeloNuevo.subtitulo: Add a new model and let the system work out costs, price and profit per hour.

modeloForm.licenciaHint: Determines whether the model can be sold (legal filter).
modeloForm.nichoHint: e.g. Day of the Dead, gaming, spare parts

filamentoDetalle.subtitulo: Adjust the cost per kg and stock; this data feeds the costing of every model.

impresoraForm.modeloHint: If it has AMS, include it in the name, e.g. "Bambu Lab A1 (AMS)"

gestionDatos.descripcion: Delete the models catalog (and/or sales) when you start loading the real ones. <fuerte>It never touches filaments or printers</fuerte> (those are real data). Before deleting, a <fuerte>JSON backup</fuerte> is automatically downloaded to your device.
gestionDatos.confirmarModelos: Delete the {n} models? A backup will be downloaded first. Filaments and printers are NOT touched.
gestionDatos.okModelos: ✓ {n} models deleted. Backup downloaded to your device.
gestionDatos.confirmarVentas: Delete the {n} test sales? A backup will be downloaded first.
